subcodes.first_line: O servant of truth! Be thou intoxicated with the chalice of the All-Merciful, and seek thou the aid and bounty of the Lord Divine. Though earthly delights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق سرمست ساغر رحمانی باش و طالب عون و عنایت حضرت ربانی اگر لذائذ وجود
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
